/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++20 -fvisibility=hidden -Wall -Werror -shared -Wl,-soname,libsai.so -o libsai.so CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/dev_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_meta_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_router_if.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_switch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_attenuator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_oa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_ocm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_osc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_wss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_otdr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_otn_otdr_scan_type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/otdr_static_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/otn_threshold_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai_adapter_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/virtual_otn_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/virtual_otn_dev_mgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/hal_event_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sai.dir/src/sai.c.o  -lpthread
